debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hf : IsIso f
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f ∧ @CategoryInContext.Category.Epi α C X Y f

proof:
obtain ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := hf
  constructor
  · intro W h k heq
    have : (h ≫ f) ≫ g = (k ≫ f) ≫ g := by rw [heq]
    rw [assoc, assoc, hfg, comp_id, comp_id] at this
    exact this
  · intro Z h k heq
    have : g ≫ (f ≫ h) = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [heq]
    rw [← assoc, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp, id_comp] at this
    exact this

    rw [assoc, assoc, hfg, comp_id, comp_id] at this
    exact this
  · intro Z h k heq
    have : g ≫ (f ≫ h) = g ≫ (f ≫ k) := by rw [heq]
    rw [← assoc, ← assoc, hgf, id_comp, id_comp] at this
